2606.30092.title: Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning in StarCraft Micromanagement with Influence Maps and Cluster-based Scripts
2606.30092.paper_summary: Real-time strategy (RTS) games present significant AI challenges, characterized by expansive state-action spaces arising from multi-unit coordination in continuous battlefields, and sparse delayed rewards stemming from final win/lose signals. Existing approaches face a trade-off between managing the dimensionality explosion of joint actions and maintaining the interpretability of complex state representations. This complexity is further intensified by the limitation of traditional hierarchical structures in adaptively decomposing tasks into effective tactical modules. Such difficulties are compounded by the black-box nature of deep learning models and their reliance on sparse rewards, which together result in limited sample efficiency and a lack of decision-making transparency. To address these limitations, this paper proposes HRL-IM/CBS, a hierarchical reinforcement learning framework with influence map hashing and cluster-based scripts for StarCraft micromanagement. Influence map hashing encodes global battlefield situations into compact hexadecimal codes, capturing spatial control and relative advantage. Cluster-based scripts enable dynamic local coordination through adaptive unit partitioning. The hierarchical multi-Q-table architecture decomposes decision-making into upper-level clustering strategy selection and lower-level tactical execution, with reward allocation providing dense learning signals. Experiments across six asymmetric scenarios demonstrate competitive performance against deep RL baselines while offering advantages in sample efficiency and interpretability through transparent Q-table representations.
2606.30092.paper_summary_zh: 即時戰略（RTS）遊戲提出了重大的人工智慧挑戰，其特徵在於由於多單位協調而產生的廣泛狀態-行動空間，以及源於最終勝負信號的稀疏延遲獎勵。現有的方法面臨著在管理聯合行動的維度爆炸和保持複雜狀態表示的可解釋性之間的權衡。這種複雜性因傳統層次結構在自適應地將任務分解為有效戰術模塊方面的限制而進一步加劇。這些困難因深度學習模型的黑箱特性及其對稀疏獎勵的依賴而加重，這兩者共同導致了有限的樣本效率和缺乏決策透明度。為了解決這些限制，本文提出了HRL-IM/CBS，一種具有影響圖哈希和基於集群的腳本的層次強化學習框架，用於《星際爭霸》的微觀管理。影響圖哈希將全球戰場情況編碼為緊湊的十六進制代碼，捕捉空間控制和相對優勢。基於集群的腳本通過自適應單位劃分實現動態本地協調。層次多Q表架構將決策分解為上層聚類策略選擇和下層戰術執行，獎勵分配提供了密集的學習信號。在六個不對稱場景中的實驗顯示，該方法在樣本效率和可解釋性方面相較於深度強化學習基準表現出競爭力，同時通過透明的Q表表示提供了優勢。
2606.30092.author: Chunhui Bai et.al.
2606.30092.authors: Chunhui Bai, Changhe Li, Dequan Li, Xinye Cai, Shengxiang Yang
